flashcards.front: What is the purpose of static variables in Java?
flashcards.back: To share data among all instances of a class

flashcards.front: Can static methods access instance variables?
flashcards.back: Yes, they can access both static and instance variables

flashcards.front: When are static blocks executed in Java?
What is the purpose of static nested classes in Java?
flashcards.back: To provide better encapsulation and code organization

flashcards.front: Can static variables be accessed using an instance of the class?
flashcards.back: Yes, they can be accessed using both the class name and an instance
